description_for_human: Scan CI/CD pipeline behavior across GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Jenkins, Azure DevOps, and CircleCI. AI-powered findings, DLP, OPA policies, SARIF export.
description_for_model: PipeWarden is a DevSecOps pipeline scanner. Use it to: list user CI/CD connections, trigger heuristic + AI security scans on a connection, fetch findings, export SARIF, and check policy compliance. Always confirm with the user before triggering a scan that may cost API credits.
